channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech

item.title: Fox News AI Newsletter: Brand new Alexa
item.description: Stay up to date on the latest AI technology advancements and learn about the challenges and opportunities AI presents now and for the future.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Netflix has 8 new movies and shows with 100% on Rotten Tomatoes so far in 2025 – here they are
item.description: Stream the best new movies and shows on Netflix in 2025 according to Rotten Tomatoes with animation, drama, true crime and more.
item.dc:creator: TechRadar

item.title: Tired of overdramatic TikTok food influencers? Professional critics are too
item.description: TikTok and Instagram are flooded with reels of food influencers hyping already viral restaurants or bringing hundreds of thousands of eyes to hidden gems.
item.dc:creator: Eve Upton-Clark, Fast Company

item.title: Intel’s anticipated $28 billion chip factories in Ohio are delayed until 2030
item.description: Intel‘s promised $28 billion chip fabrication plants in Ohio are facing further delays, with the first factory in New Albany expected to not be completed until 2030, local media outlet The Columbus Dispatch reported on Friday.
item.dc:creator: Reuters, Fast Company

item.title: This smart baby monitor with dual mode and enhanced alerts from Momcozy will give new parents peace of mind
item.description: The Momcozy 5-inch Dual-Mode Smart Baby Monitor is a great choice for parents who want to keep an eye on their little ones. It's packed with features including motion and cry detection and temperature monitoring, so you can be certain that your baby is in good hands when monitored by Momcozy.
item.dc:creator: TechRadar

item.title: Is this the perfect portable router? GL-iNet's latest model offers dual SIM, load balancing, gigabit LAN ports and four massive antennas
item.description: GL.iNet’s Spitz Plus GL-X2000 merges dual SIM speeds with bandwidth bonding, offering a fast, stable Wi-Fi 6 connection for mobile users and remote locations.
item.dc:creator: TechRadar

item.title: Chip Ganassi Racing partners with OpenAI in first motorsports venture for AI company
item.description: ST. PETERSBURG, Fla. (AP) — Chip Ganassi Racing on Friday said it has partnered on a strategic research collaboration with OpenAI — a deal that makes the two-time reigning IndyCar championship winning team the first to bring in a partner from the artificial intelligence field.
item.dc:creator: JENNA FRYER, Associated Press, KRON4

item.title: Why Ethan Klein is feuding with r/Fauxmoi
item.description: Pop culture subreddit r/Fauxmoi is embroiled in an ongoing controversy with YouTuber and podcaster Ethan Klein. Klein first rose to internet fame through his YouTube channel, h3h3Productions, which he co-created with his wife, Hila Klein. The channel now boasts 5.71 million subscribers.
item.dc:creator: Eve Upton-Clark, Fast Company

item.title: Microsoft shutting down Skype in May
item.description: Microsoft is closing down Skype, the video-calling service it bought for $8.5 billion in 2011, which had helped spark a transformation in how people communicate online.
item.dc:creator: MATT O'BRIEN, Associated Press, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: East Bay startup’s new stove that plugs into a normal wall outlet could be major gain for health and climate
item.description: The sleek, standard four-burner electric induction stove runs on 120 volts, meaning there is no need to pay a licensed electrician thousands of dollars to rewire to 240 volts, which many electric stoves require.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, The Mercury News

item.title: How to avoid the hidden costs of onboarding
item.description: For employees, onboarding shapes their first impression of the company, helping them feel welcome and confident in their decision to join. For employers, onboarding involves numerous costs – both monetary and less quantifiable – that can make or break the bottom line.
item.dc:creator: CIO

item.title: How to get Sharp Fang in Monster Hunter Wilds
item.description: Here's where to find Sharp Fang in Monster Hunter Wilds, so that you can start crafting better armor sets and weapons.
item.dc:creator: TechRadar

item.title: Not even Google is safe from job cuts - cloud, HR roles set to go
item.description: Google’s People Operations workers are at risk as the company looks to shed some of its more expensive employees.
item.dc:creator: TechRadar

item.title: Prioridades de los líderes TI en materia de IA: productividad por encima de la innovación
item.description: Los líderes de TI siguen apuntando a lo más fácil cuando utilizan la inteligencia artificial (IA), centrándose en mejorar la productividad de los empleados en lugar de dar rienda suelta a usos más avanzados como permitir la innovación o aumentar los ingresos, según una nueva encuesta.
item.dc:creator: CIO

item.title: OpenAI unveils its new GPT-4.5 large language model
item.description: OpenAI released a new base model on Thursday called GPT-4.5, which the company said is its best and smartest model for chat yet. It’s not a reasoning model like OpenAI’s o1 and o3 models, but it can be used to train other models to be reasoning models.
item.dc:creator: Mark Sullivan, Fast Company

item.title: IBM closes Hashicorp buy, looks to boost enterprise multicloud and AI automation technology
item.description: In announcing the closure of its $6.4 billion buy of Hashicorp, IBM said its goal is to infuse HashiCorp automation and security technology in every data center possible.
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: Gabbard decries Britain's reported demand for Apple to provide backdoor access to users' cloud data
item.description: WASHINGTON (AP) — Director of National Intelligence Tulsi Gabbard says she has serious concerns about the British government's reported demand that Apple provide backdoor access to any data stored in the cloud.
item.dc:creator: DAVID KLEPPER, Associated Press, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: Meta apologizes for 'error' that resulted in violent content flooding Instagram feeds
item.description: Meta, the parent company of Facebook and Instagram, apologized Thursday for a technical error that resulted in some users' Reels feeds being filled with graphic or violent content.
item.dc:creator: Miranda Nazzaro, The Hill

item.title: NFL NextGen Stats team unveils new tool to help fans better understand combine results
item.description: The NFL scouting combine provides a blizzard of data with hundreds of prospects running through various drills ranging from the 40-yard dash to the vertical jump to a short shuttle.
item.dc:creator: JOSH DUBOW, Associated Press, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: The Rise of Mac Malware in 2025: What You Need to Know
item.description: Mac cybersecurity threats are on the rise, with numerous malware attacks targeting Apple laptops. Discover how to protect your Mac from infostealers and other malicious software.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: F5 targets AI application security with renewed workload management software
item.description: F5 is evolving its core application and load balancing software to help customers secure and manage AI-powered and multicloud workloads.
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: StarlingX bridges IPv4-IPv6 gap with dual-stack networking support
item.description: The Open Infrastructure Foundation is out with the release of StarlingX 10.0, a significant update to the open-source distributed cloud platform designed for IoT, 5G, O-RAN and edge computing applications.
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: Vietnam plans energy shift toward building more solar, less reliance on gas and coal
item.description: HANOI, Vietnam (AP) — Vietnam is revising its energy plans to focus more on large solar farms and less on reliance on coal and natural gas. The fast-growing economy now aims to get 16% of its energy from the sun — more than triple its earlier target of just 5%.
item.dc:creator: ANIRUDDHA GHOSAL, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Nvidia sales surge in the fourth quarter on demand for AI chips
item.description: LOS ANGELES (AP) — Nvidia on Wednesday reported a surge in fourth-quarter profit and sales as demand for its specialized Blackwell chips, which power artificial intelligence systems, continued to grow, sending the company's stock higher after hours. For the three months that ended Jan.
item.dc:creator: SARAH PARVINI, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Man who said he was upset with Musk and Trump charged with threatening to burn down xAI facility
item.description: ASHLAND CITY, Tenn. (AP) — A Tennessee man has been charged with an act of terrorism after he threatened to burn down an xAI facility because he was upset with its founder, Elon Musk, and President Donald Trump, authorities said.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Alibaba open sources its video-generation AI model
item.description: Chinese cloud provider Alibaba has released four versions of its video-generation AI model as open source, allowing users to download and run them for free on capable PCs.
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: Las Vegas PD announce nation’s first fleet of police Tesla Cybertrucks
item.description: The Las Vegas Metropolitan Police Department (LVMPD) announced it had been gifted the country’s first fleet of Tesla Cybertrucks for law enforcement use. During an address, LVMPD said an unnamed donor gifted the department at least 10 Cybertrucks to use for patrol and SWAT teams.
item.dc:creator: Lauren Irwin, The Hill

item.title: US Department of Government Efficiency Appoints New Chief Amid Controversy
item.description: The US Department of Government Efficiency has appointed a new chief, Amy Gleason, amidst controversy and scrutiny over the department's actions.
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: Amazon's new AI-powered Alexa promises to be your 'best friend in a digital world' for a monthly fee
item.description: Amazon on Wednesday unveiled a generative-AI infused Alexa that it says will allow the popular voice assistant to have more personality, check a user’s tone and even plan romantic dates.
item.dc:creator: Haleluya Hadero And Wyatte Grantham-Philips, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Red Hat OpenShift 4.18 expands cloud-native networking
item.description: Red Hat is updating its OpenShift platform with a series of capabilities that will provide more advanced networking and virtualization functionality for cloud-native deployments. OpenShift is Red Hat’s commercially supported Kubernetes distribution.
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: Autonomous robotaxi successfully completes 75 mph highway testing
item.description: Motional is developing autonomous vehicles capable of handling a wide range of real-world scenarios. Its high-speed robotaxi testing reached speeds of 75 mph.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Red Hat OpenShift 4.18: Enhancements for Simplified Management
item.description: Red Hat OpenShift 4.18 has arrived, with enhancements designed to simplify management of virtual machines and containers.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: Can you spot a credit card skimmer? What to look for
item.description: Before putting your card into a reader, the FBI says there are some easy and effective ways to protect your information.
item.dc:creator: Michael Bartiromo, NewsNation
